case_title: PATEL, RAMESH P. vs. CAMPBELL, BENNIE LEE et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION GIVING PROPERTY MANAGER AUTHORITY TO SUE ON OWNERS BEHALF FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, RAMESH P.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PATEL, RAMESH P. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CAMPBELL, BENNIE LEE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 88 SIXTH ST #425, LEASE FORFEITED
